name: Manual of Iron Golems
description:
This tome contains information and incantations necessary to make a {@creature iron golem|XMM}. To decipher and use the manual, you must be a spellcaster with at least two 5th-level spell slots. A creature that can't use a {@i manual of golems} and attempts to read it takes {@damage 6d6} psychic damage.
To create an iron golem, you must spend 120 days, working without interruption with the manual at hand and resting no more than 8 hours per day. You must also pay 100,000 gp to purchase supplies.
